queries.question: Show all the action movies and romantic comedies lasting 2 hours.
queries.sql:
SELECT Movies.Title 
FROM Movies
WHERE (Movies.genre = "Action Movie" OR Movies.genre = "Romantic Comedy") AND Movies.duration = 120
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title WHERE {
  ?movies a :Movies .
  ?movies p:title ?title .
  ?movies p:genre ?genre_w .
  ?movies p:genre ?genre_w2 .
  ?movies p:duration ?duration_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?genre_w) = "Action Movie" || STR(?genre_w2) = "Romantic Comedy")) && (STR(?duration_w) = "120" || STR(?duration_w) = "120.0")))
}
